text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The popularity results for the Arima Kinen are in...
and I have come out on top! I waste no time
calling a press conference to make my future
intentions known.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The room is wall to wall with people! They will
surely be blessed for seeking out this incarnation
of beauty that is I!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I treat the citizenry to an eight-hour opera to
express my sheer joy!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: But... I have not forgotten the one who was with me stride for stride, guiding me to the throne. Yes, I have not forgotten you.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I dedicate myself to you. Now, with this victory at
the Arima Kinen, and from its throne, I bestow
upon you the title of Greatest Trainer!
